title: samolus ebracteatus var. breviflorus
intro: Samolus ebracteatus var. breviflorus, also known as a variety of Samolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion to be consumed as a herbal remedy, and can also be used topically for wound healing and skin care.
